title: Graham Hancock on the mystery of the Ark of the Covenant! #mystery #history #bible #grahamhancock
summary: Graham Hancock discusses the Ark of the Covenant, describing its biblical origins as a device given to Moses on Mount Sinai, its role in guiding the Israelites, and its reportedly deadly effects on those who came into contact with it.

key_claims.claim: Guardians of the Ark of the Covenant have a lifespan of about 3 years after being appointed
The Ark of the Covenant has a detailed description in the Book of Exodus that reads like a blueprint for a device
God supposedly gave the Ark's design to Moses on Mount Sinai
The Ark contains the tablets of the Ten Commandments according to the Book of Exodus
The Ark strikes people dead and caused cancerous tumors among the Philistines who captured it
